'''danguvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khediva|khediva]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khediva|khediva]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| danguvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dængivith|dængivith]] || [[word:dængivij|dængivij]] || [[word:dængivish|dængivish]] || [[word:dængivi|dængivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dangunguvuth|dangunguvuth]] || [[word:dangunguvuj|dangunguvuj]] || [[word:dangunguvush|dangunguvush]] || [[word:dangunguvu|dangunguvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:danguvuth|danguvuth]] || [[word:danguvuj|danguvuj]] || [[word:danguvush|danguvush]] || [[word:danguvu|danguvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dangufvuth|dangufvuth]] || [[word:dangufvuj|dangufvuj]] || [[word:dangufvush|dangufvush]] || [[word:dangufvuf|dangufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:danguvuthu|danguvuthu]] || [[word:danguvuju|danguvuju]] || [[word:danguvushu|danguvushu]] || [[word:danguvuku|danguvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:danguvuth|danguvuth]] || [[word:danguvuj|danguvuj]] || [[word:danguvush|danguvush]] || [[word:danguvu|danguvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:danguvuthul|danguvuthul]] || [[word:danguvujul|danguvujul]] || [[word:danguvushul|danguvushul]] || [[word:danguvukul|danguvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:danguvuthuthu|danguvuthuthu]] || [[word:danguvujuju|danguvujuju]] || [[word:danguvushushu|danguvushushu]] || [[word:danguvuku|danguvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:danguvuthun|danguvuthun]] || [[word:danguvujun|danguvujun]] || [[word:danguvushun|danguvushun]] || [[word:danguvukun|danguvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:danguvuthuoro|danguvuthuoro]] || [[word:danguvujuoro|danguvujuoro]] || [[word:danguvushuoro|danguvushuoro]] || [[word:danguvukuoro|danguvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
